properties.name: Støjskærm, Dall
properties.source: Vejdirektoratet, Opdaterede støjberegninger for den 3. Limfjordsforbindelse, november 2023, Tabel 6
properties.note: Runs along the eastern side of E45 Nordjyske Motorvej near the Dall interchange. Geometry manually traced to align with the mapped road corridor.

properties.name: Støjskærm, Dall Villaby
properties.source: Vejdirektoratet, Opdaterede støjberegninger for den 3. Limfjordsforbindelse, november 2023, Tabel 6
properties.note: Runs along the 3. Limfjordsforbindelse east of Dallvej (6 m) and west of Dallvej (7 m) at Dall Villaby. Geometry manually traced to align with the mapped road corridor.

properties.name: Støjskærm, Nibevej (østlig side)
properties.source: Vejdirektoratet, Opdaterede støjberegninger for den 3. Limfjordsforbindelse, november 2023, Tabel 6
properties.note: Eastern side of the 3. Limfjordsforbindelse at Nibevej, near Drastrup. Screens run south of Nibevej (5 m) and north of Nibevej (6 m); the 1400 m length covers both sides combined. Geometry manually traced to align with the mapped road corridor.

properties.name: Støjskærm, Nibevej (vestlig side)
properties.source: Vejdirektoratet, Opdaterede støjberegninger for den 3. Limfjordsforbindelse, november 2023, Tabel 6
properties.note: Western side of the 3. Limfjordsforbindelse at Nibevej, near Drastrup. Screens run south of Nibevej (5 m) and north of Nibevej (6 m); the 1400 m length covers both sides combined. Geometry manually traced to align with the mapped road corridor.

properties.name: Støjskærm, Nørholmsvej
properties.source: Vejdirektoratet, Opdaterede støjberegninger for den 3. Limfjordsforbindelse, november 2023, Tabel 6
properties.note: Runs along the eastern side of the 3. Limfjordsforbindelse both north and south of Nørholmsvej, at interchange TSA 12 - Mølholm. Geometry manually traced to align with the mapped road corridor.
